description: Generated feed-2-mcp MCP manifest for the Grants.gov new/modified opportunities RSS feed.

notes: Grants.gov (a U.S. federal government service) publishes official RSS feeds for new and modified funding opportunities, documented at https://grants.gov/connect/rss-feeds (byte-verified sha256:12d7becc41d73f60759b407690c7281bf04d11dd61bb57590b347f5a10a290b7 across two fetches on 2026-07-09). This manifest pins the 'New/Modified Opportunities by Category' feed (GG_OppModByCategory.xml); a sibling feed (GG_OppModByAgency.xml) provides the same updates grouped by federal agency instead of category.
